name: Netflix
description: Monthly subscription fee for streaming service with a wide variety of movies and TV shows.

name: Spotify
description: Monthly subscription fee for music streaming service with a vast library of songs and playlists.

name: Paycheck
description: Monthly salary deposit from employer for work performed during the month.

name: Apple Store
description: Purchase of electronics and accessories from Apple retail store.

name: Google Ads
description: Monthly advertising expenses for online marketing campaigns on Google platform.

name: Stripe
description: Payment processing fees for online transactions through Stripe payment gateway.
